response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the video content. 00:00-03:42 is promotional content with instrumental music. 03:43-05:03 features a vocal performance. 2. Identified the song title as 'Daisuke' and composer as '田村信二' (Shinji Tamura) from on-screen text. 3. Used the search tool to find the official lyrics for 'Daisuke' by Y&Co./Tetsuya Tamura. 4. Confirmed the lyrics and language. 5. Mapped the scenes and compiled the JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip featuring IRyS from Hololive. It begins with an intro showcasing her 3D outfit reveal and then transitions into a vocal performance of the song 'Daisuke', originally by Y&Co. (credited to Shinji Tamura in the video).

scenes.description: Introductory segment displaying the 'RACING TOWARDS HYPE' 3D outfit reveal announcement. The segment features energetic electronic background music but no vocals.
IRyS performs a cover of 'Daisuke'. The video features her singing on a race track setting, with on-screen text identifying the song and composer.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
I'm a country girl,
but you're a super city boy.
I'm a natural girl,
but you're a prince for me.
Everyday wondering how I become your girl.
Every night, I'm feeling your body in my dreams.
I can't sleep at all, hello, morning sun.
My love, my crush, (I) wanna tell you my feeling.
Please tell me now, how do you feel me?
Please show me now.
I wanna dance with you more.
Right now, I want you're one for you.
Every time, everywhere,
I will surely get your honest love.
Daisuke...
